Need a hand setting up?: Ma u baahan tahay caawimaad dejin?
Our team can walk you through connecting: Kooxdayadu way kugu hagi karaan ku xidhista qalab kasta — kaliya nala soo xidhiidh.
A complete Business-in-a-Box — from barc: Ganacsi-Sanduuq-ku-jira oo dhammaystiran — laga bilaabo lacag-bixin barcode ilaa deyn, xakamaynta shaqaalaha, iyo warbixino. Taabo astaan kasta si aad u aragto sida ay u shaqeyso.
Start free, or try every Pro feature fre: Bilow bilaash, ama tijaabi astaan kasta oo Pro bilaash 14 maalmood — kaar looma baahna.
Real people, real answers. Message us di: Dad dhab ah, jawaabo dhab ah. Si toos ah noo soo fariin, ama soo dir foomka hoose, waanan kuu soo laaban doonnaa.
Reach us directly: Si toos ah nagala soo xidhiidh
Pick whatever's easiest — we usually rep: Dooro waxa ugu fudud — badanaa si dhakhso ah ayaan u jawaabnaa.
Fill in your details and we'll get back: Buuxi faahfaahintaada, waxaanan kuugu soo laaban doonnaa iimayl.
Tell us how we can help…: Noo sheeg sida aan kuu caawin karno…
We'll only use your details to reply to: Faahfaahintaada waxaan u isticmaali doonnaa kaliya inaan kuu soo jawaabno.
No expensive terminals. Pair everyday de: Kombuyuutar qaali ah ma jiro. Ku xidh qalab maalinle ah Raad — taabona kaadhka si aad u aragto sida loo xidho.
Print clean receipts straight from your: Daabac rasiidho nadiif ah si toos ah taleefankaaga Bluetooth — ama USB.
Use your phone camera as a scanner, or p: Isticmaal kamaradka taleefankaaga sawir-akhriste ahaan, ama ku xidh akhriste Bluetooth/USB si aad u dhakhso geliso lacag-bixinta.
Connect a Bluetooth receipt printer to R: Ku xidh daabace rasiid Bluetooth ah Raad qiyaastii hal daqiiqo — sidan ayaa loo sameeyaa.
You'll need a Windows PC, your thermal p: Waxaad u baahan doontaa PC Windows ah, daabacahaaga kulul oo USB ku xidhan, iyo qiyaastii shan daqiiqo. Hal mar ayaad daabace kasta u samaynaysaa.
Two ways to scan: your phone camera with: Laba siyaabood oo wax loo sawiro: kamaradka taleefankaaga oo aan waxba dheeraad ahayn, ama akhriste gaar ah oo Bluetooth/USB ah oo xawaare leh.
Clear, practical guides for everything R: Hagayaal cad oo wax-ku-ool ah oo ku saabsan wax kasta oo Raad sameeyo — laga bilaabo iibkaaga ugu horreeya ilaa maamulka shaqaalaha, deynta, iyo Web POS-ka desktop.
Can't find what you need?: Ma heli kartid waxa aad u baahan tahay?
